A '''transliterator''' was an [[Electronic translator/Legends|electronic translator]] device used to translate various alien languages into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. It was attached to the throat and could be programmed with different voices.

The [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] sow, [[Ugmush]], used a transliterator with the voice of the [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star [[Amber Jevanche]] programmed in. The [[Buzchub]], [[Und'l]], also made use of one.

{{Tech-stub}}
